Video.summary: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.
Video.title: Off-Grid Living: The Creative Space

Video.summary: Jillian learns how history inspires the future, touring boundary-pushing homes with a modern twist.
Video.title: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

Image.alt: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels

Video.summary: Jillian dives into community living, exploring how we create spaces that bring us closer together.
Video.title: From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone

Image.alt: From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone
From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone

Video.summary: Matthew heads to Beverly Hills, the pinnacle of A-List living.
Video.title: Beverly Hills Ultimate Estates

Video.summary: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.
Video.title: The Gambin's "Offline"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies gets a look at the Pipe Dream - equal parts sport machine and floating celebration.
Video.title: Captain Cholly's "Pipe Dream"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies joins the Paglias aboard their yacht Executive Decision for a deep-sea adventure.
Video.title: The Paglia's "Executive Decision"

Video.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.
Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.summary: Jillian experiences a kaleidoscope of color exploring the Mosaic Tile House and the Rainbow House.
Video.title: Living in Art: Kaleidoscopic Homes

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Anne is an entrepreneur whose home office headquarters is having an identity crisis.
Video.title: Office

Video.summary: Jordan and Jeff crave an oasis that completely reimagines what a home gym can be.
Video.title: Home Gym Sanctuary

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: Matthew explores the gorgeous, guard-gated equestrian community of Hidden Hills, California.
Video.title: Hidden Hills Equestrian Enclave

Video.summary: Matthew heads to Pasadena, the picture-perfect backdrop for a home like no other.
Video.title: Pasadena Billionaire's Bunker

Video.summary: Andrea and her sister Sabrina head to spectacular Los Cabos for the adventure of a lifetime.
Video.title: Living It Up in Los Cabos

Image.alt: Living It Up in Los Cabos
Living It Up in Los Cabos
Living It Up in Los Cabos

Video.summary: Designer Lucie Ayres shares her secret for adding warmth to a stark, modern California home.
Video.title: California Modern Refresh

Video.summary: Los Angeles-based designer, Eddie Mickenberg welcomes you into this Encino, California home.
Video.title: Moody & Masculine Mid-Century Style

Video.summary: Family traditions shine bright as the dining room gets its moment in the spotlight.
Video.title: Dinnertime Down South

Video.summary: Rest and relaxation are front and center as the master suite gets a new look.
Video.title: Unwinding & Weaving

Video.summary: Art and culture come together when a former vault is transformed into the ultimate music room.
Video.title: Hitting the High Notes

Video.summary: Don Massenburg invites you to tour this beautiful French country farmhouse.
Video.title: Modern French Country Farmhouse

Video.summary: DIYer Philip or Flop helps homeowners transform a neglected space - and all he needs is a day!

Video.summary: The Rucker home is finally ready for its big Charleston debut.
Video.title: Making History

Video.title: Going Off the Grid

Video.title: Bel Air Palatial Properties

Video.title: Architectural Masterpieces

Video.title: Deer Valley Ski-In/Out Vacation Home

Video.title: Feminine Casual Cottage

Video.title: Let Go and Let Gary

Video.title: Corbels, Old Doors, & Cupolas

Video.summary: The mortar on the exterior stone is finally dry, but hasn’t turned out at all like Leah envisioned.
Video.title: Like Watching Mortar Dry

Video.summary: Leah focuses on interior selections, but choosing paint colors proves to be more difficult than she thought.
Video.title: Bring Your Daughter to Work Year

Video.summary: With the end of the project in sight, everyone’s working hard to make sure the Finn's make their move-in date!
Video.title: The Final Push

Video.summary: Leah’s heard that the last 10% of the build takes 90% of the effort … and it couldn’t be more true.
Video.title: Making the Date
